TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Sweden = Gaga kska Owcow ka Sweden, 62 00 N, 15 00 E ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 450,295 sq km(hangan na o Tg56) (knlbanga dxgal o 410,335 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 39,960 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 9,880,604 hiyi. Gaga Stockholm ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 6 idas 6 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Sweden ga wada sugan 7.50% ka dxgal qpahan, 68.70% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 23.80% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Carl XVI Gustaf, pnaah hngkawas1973 idas 9 jiyax 15pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: = swədən = gaga kska owʦow ka swədən, ** ** n, ** ** ə ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŋan na o ***,*** sq km(ħaŋan na o tg**) (knlbaŋa dxgal o ***,*** sq km, knlbaŋan qsija o **,*** sq km). kana ka səɟiqun o niqan *,***,*** ħiji. gaga stoʦkħolm ka pusu alaŋ paɾu, ɟijax * idas * ka ɟijax skɾajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal swədən ga wada sugan *.**% ka dxgal qpaħan, **.**% ka dxgal bbuju, ɾaħuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŋ klwaan ta sajaŋ o kija ka ʦaɾl x*i gusta*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas**** idas * ɟijax **pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ʦinkħulan sa knita' sa bɾbiɾu'
S.FORM: = Sweden = Gaga kska Owcow ka Sweden, 62 00 N, 15 00 E ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 450,295 sq km(hangan na o Tg56) (knlbanga dxgal o 410,335 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 39,960 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 9,880,604 hiyi. Gaga Stockholm ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 6 idas 6 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Sweden ga wada sugan 7.50% ka dxgal qpahan, 68.70% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 23.80% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Carl XVI Gustaf, pnaah hngkawas1973 idas 9 jiyax 15pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: = swədən = gaga kska owʦow ka swədən, ** ** n, ** ** ə ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŋan na o ***,*** sq km(ħaŋan na o tg**) (knlbaŋa dxgal o ***,*** sq km, knlbaŋan qsija o **,*** sq km). kana ka səɟiqun o niqan *,***,*** ħiji. gaga stoʦkħolm ka pusu alaŋ paɾu, ɟijax * idas * ka ɟijax skɾajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal swədən ga wada sugan *.**% ka dxgal qpaħan, **.**% ka dxgal bbuju, ɾaħuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŋ klwaan ta sajaŋ o kija ka ʦaɾl x*i gusta*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas**** idas * ɟijax **pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ʦinkħulan sa knita' sa bɾbiɾu'
